infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VenueFlow uses your location for indoor navigation and zone-based alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: VenueFlow uses your location for indoor navigation and zone-based alerts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VenueFlow uses the camera to scan QR tickets and provide AR navigation overlays.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VenueFlow uses the microphone for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: VenueFlow uses speech recognition for voice navigation commands.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow VenueFlow to access camera for QR scanning.
